message:
feat(tui): formalize overlay stack policy and escape-precedence contract (br-1xt0m.1.4.1)

Adds OverlayLayer enum that explicitly documents the z-order and
focus-trapping contract for all overlay types (Palette > Modal >
ActionMenu > MacroPlayback > ToastFocus > Help > Toasts > None).

- OverlayLayer with repr(u8) discriminants encoding render z-order
- traps_focus() method distinguishes focus-trapping from passive overlays
- topmost_overlay() query on MailAppModel for deterministic state inspection
- Event routing comments now reference OverlayLayer contract
- 9 regression tests covering precedence behavior under stacked states

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
